parameters.draftMessage/Body:
Hello,

This is Jake with Example Company.

Just wanted to follow up on the quote we recently sent and see if you had any questions or needed anything from us.

We're happy to help and would appreciate any update when you have a chance.

Thank you,

Alex Morgan
Service Project Manager/Estimator
Example Company
123 Example Street
Example City, ST 00000
p: (555) 010-0000 EXT 100
c: (555) 010-0000
e: contact2@example.com
w: www.example.com
License #000000
